steps.title: Substitute the input
steps.content:
The question asks for the function value when the input is $36$. Use $x=36$ in the function:
$$
f(36)=7+\sqrt{36}
$$

steps.title: Evaluate the function
steps.content: The square root of $36$ is $6$, so add that to $7$: $$ f(36)=7+6=13 $$ The answer is 13.
